title: QA / Test Specialist Result Handoff
description: Typed handoff payload produced by test specialists (Backend Test Specialist, Frontend Test Specialist) reporting test run results to the Orchestration Governor. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

type.description: Payload type discriminator. Must always be 'qa_result'.

producedBy.description: Name of the test specialist that produced this payload (e.g., 'Backend Test Specialist', 'Frontend Test Specialist').

producedAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this payload was produced.

workPackage.description: Identifier matching the work unit that was tested.

testCommand.description: Exact test command that was run (e.g., 'npm test', 'npx vitest run src/features/auth/').

totalTests.description: Total number of tests in the run.

skipped.description: Number of tests that were skipped.

verdict.description: 'pass': all tests pass (failed = 0); 'fail': one or more tests failed.

failureSummary.description: Brief summary of test failures including error messages. Use 'none' if verdict is pass.

coverageNotes.description: Optional notes on coverage gaps or newly added test coverage.

recommendedNextAgent.description: Name of the next agent: 'governor' if tests passed, 'Implementation Specialist' or domain-specific specialist if failures require fixing.
